text:
Once upon a time in Cherry blossom Town, there was a young girl named Lily. She loved bees twice as much as butterflies. Every spring she'd chase bees inside orchards.

One particular spring, Lily noticed something strange. Bees buzzed differently. They seemed more interested in cherry blossoms.

Days passed. Then weeks. Cherry trees blossomed like never before. Lily thought it was magical. She watched bees nightly.

One night, she saw something. A tiny little bee had wings torn off.

"Losing limbs must hurt," Lily thought.

She felt sympathy.

Then she saw something else.

The bee found pliers!

"With those?"

"It buzzes louder."

She helped.

Later, bees danced. Lily danced. People came.

She became famous.

Then came harvest. She collected fruit.

But she missed bees.

One day...

She found feather boa bees.

Laughed so hard they flew away.

That autumn. Birds nested owl. Little owls loved bird eggs.

Lily kept bees
